channel.title: The Broken toys
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Broken toys" - The Broken toys are a group of entities that hunt bad children and turn them into parts for more toys, to get more bad children.

item.title: Forum Criticism Team - Captain Post
item.content:encoded:
Geirundi, to better help the author here, can you be more specific? What about the idea do you think is great? Why?

Why do you think it needs to be fleshed out? You've given some examples, but you don't really provide any reasoning for why the author might want to add those elements. What do you as a reader want to see developed further, and why? How would that improve the article?

For more information on providing feedback in this forum, please see this thread: http://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/forum/t-9804362/so-you-want-to-be-a-concept-reviewer

item.title: Re: The Broken toys
item.content:encoded: I think this a great idea with a lot of potential, maybe just flesh it out a little, maybe there's a certain instance where it came from, or maybe something else, or maybe they're just angry toys, who know, I think if you fleshed it out more, it would be a great outcome

item.title: The Broken toys
item.content:encoded:
Seeking Greenlight Yes

Page Type SCP Article

Genre (optional):Horror

Elevator Pitch: The broken toys are a group of entities that resemble beaten-up old toys with extra or missing limbs and these toys turn naughty or bad children into plastic pieces to make more toys to help with getting rid of more bad children.

Central Narrative A family of one father, mother, and two kids are opening gifts on Christmas day,
one of those kids was very bad that year, and he received a very odd-looking deformed toy. later that day the family went looking for their child and could only find the toy's packaging and a note saying thanks for the donation.
